tool_args.label: C&D standardizing Safety Management System
tool_args.raw_text: C&D is standardizing its Safety Management System across all construction sites, contractors, and internal teams. The approach includes more frequent inspections, additional training, hazard assessments, and better communication with contractors, all contributing to measurable safety improvements.
